initial workflow

2026-03-08

Project Responsibilities

Mason Yates - Maps, Heatmaps, Density graphs - Shiny App features - Organized Code

###required libraries

library(tidyverse)
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.6
## ✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ stringr   1.6.0
## ✔ ggplot2   4.0.1     ✔ tibble    3.3.1
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tidyr     1.3.2
## ✔ purrr     1.2.1     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
library(janitor)
## 
## Attaching package: 'janitor'
## 
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     chisq.test, fisher.test
library(naniar)
library(ggplot2)
library(maps)
## 
## Attaching package: 'maps'
## 
## The following object is masked from 'package:purrr':
## 
##     map
library(ggmap)
## ℹ Google's Terms of Service: <https://mapsplatform.google.com>
##   Stadia Maps' Terms of Service: <https://stadiamaps.com/terms-of-service>
##   OpenStreetMap's Tile Usage Policy: <https://operations.osmfoundation.org/policies/tiles>
## ℹ Please cite ggmap if you use it! Use `citation("ggmap")` for details.
library(viridis)
## Loading required package: viridisLite
## 
## Attaching package: 'viridis'
## 
## The following object is masked from 'package:maps':
## 
##     unemp
library(akima)

###initial data reading and cleaning

atlantic_argos <- read_csv("../input_files/AtlanticArgos.csv")
## Rows: 45042 Columns: 5
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr  (1): lc
## dbl  (3): id, lon, lat
## dttm (1): date
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
pacific_argos <- read_csv("../input_files/PacificArgos.csv")
## Rows: 37249 Columns: 5
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr  (2): id, lc
## dbl  (2): lon, lat
## dttm (1): date
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
pacific_tad <- read_csv("../input_files/Pacific_TAD.csv") %>% 
  clean_names()
## Rows: 2484 Columns: 13
## ── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Delimiter: ","
## chr   (1): id
## dbl  (11): PAT_PTT, spot_tt, B_50, B100, B150, B200, B_200, lon, lat, SST, D...
## date  (1): Date
## 
## ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
## ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.

###maps of sample and data distrubution

register_stadiamaps("0ca4e2d5-36a9-4a89-ab81-cfc2f0ec1652", write = FALSE)

hull <- pacific_tad %>%
  slice(chull(lon, lat))

bbox <- c(
  left = min(pacific_tad$lon),
  bottom = min(pacific_tad$lat),
  right = max(pacific_tad$lon),
  top = max(pacific_tad$lat)
)

basemap <- get_stadiamap(
  bbox = bbox,
  zoom = 7,
  maptype = "alidade_smooth"
)
## ℹ © Stadia Maps © Stamen Design © OpenMapTiles © OpenStreetMap contributors.
## ℹ 170 tiles needed, this may take a while (try a smaller zoom?)
samplemap <- ggmap(basemap) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = hull,
    aes(lon, lat),
    fill = "white",
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sampled Region of Pacific Mako Sharks",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

samplemap

ggsave("../output_files/samplemap.png", plot = samplemap, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
world <- map_data("world")
deepdata <- pacific_tad %>%
  mutate(
    deep_time = b100 + b150 + b200 + b_200
  )

interp_data <- with(deepdata, interp(x = lon, y = lat, z = deep_time, duplicate = "mean"))

interp_df <- expand.grid(
  lon = interp_data$x,
  lat = interp_data$y
)

interp_df$deep_time <- as.vector(interp_data$z)

divingheatmap <- ggplot()+
  geom_raster(data = interp_df,
              aes(
                x = lon, 
                y = lat, 
                fill = deep_time)
              )+
  geom_polygon(data = world,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "white",
               color = "black",
               linewidth = 0.2)+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "Proportion Time > 100 m",
    limits = c(0,1),
    option = "cividis",
    na.value = NA
  )+
  coord_fixed(
  xlim = range(interp_df$lon) + c(-2,2),
  ylim = range(interp_df$lat) + c(-2,2)
  )+
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "Heatmap of Deep Diving Behavior",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )

divingheatmap
## Warning: Removed 681 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_raster()`).

sst_interp <- with(pacific_tad,
  interp(x = lon, y = lat, z = sst, duplicate = "mean")
)

sst_df <- expand.grid(
  lon = sst_interp$x,
  lat = sst_interp$y
)

sst_df$SST <- as.vector(sst_interp$z)

tempheatmap <- ggplot()+
  geom_raster(data = sst_df,
              aes(
                x = lon, 
                y = lat, 
                fill = SST)
              )+
  geom_polygon(data = world,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "white",
               color = "black",
               linewidth = 0.2)+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Sea Surface Temp (°C)",
                       option = "magma",
                       na.value = NA
                       )+
  coord_fixed(
    xlim = range(interp_df$lon) + c(-2,2),
    ylim = range(interp_df$lat) + c(-2,2)
  )+
  theme_classic()+
  labs(
    title = "Heatmap of Ocean Surface Temperature",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )

tempheatmap
## Warning: Removed 681 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_raster()`).

do_interp <- with(pacific_tad,
  interp(x = lon, y = lat, z = do_depth, duplicate = "mean")
)

do_df <- expand.grid(
  lon = do_interp$x,
  lat = do_interp$y
)

do_df$DO_depth <- as.vector(do_interp$z)

doheatmap <- ggplot()+
  geom_raster(data = do_df,
              aes(
                x = lon, 
                y = lat, 
                fill = DO_depth)
              )+
  geom_polygon(data = world,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "white",
               color = "black",
               linewidth = 0.2)+
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Hypoxic Boundary Depth (m)",
                       na.value = NA
                       )+
  coord_fixed(
    xlim = range(interp_df$lon) + c(-2,2),
    ylim = range(interp_df$lat) + c(-2,2)
  )+
  theme_classic()+
  labs(
    title = "Heatmap of Hypoxic Boundary Depth",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )

doheatmap
## Warning: Removed 681 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_raster()`).

ggsave("../output_files/divingheatmap.png", plot = divingheatmap, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## Warning: Removed 681 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_raster()`).
ggsave("../output_files/tempheatmap.png", plot = tempheatmap, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## Warning: Removed 681 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_raster()`).
ggsave("../output_files/doheatmap.png", plot = doheatmap, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## Warning: Removed 681 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_raster()`).

###trend graphs of dive depth to do depth

b_50plot <- pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b_50) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b_50,
      )
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5,
      color = "tan"
      )+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm,
      color = "black"
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      title = "Oxygen Boundary vs Proportion of Time, Above 50 m",
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen Boundary (m)",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
b50_150plot <- pacific_tad %>%
  mutate(
    b50_150 = b100 + b150
  ) %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b50_150) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b50_150,
      )
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5,
      color = "tan"
      )+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm,
      color = "black"
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      title = "Oxygen Boundary vs Proportion of Time, 50 - 150 m",
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen Boundary (m)",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
b150bplot <- pacific_tad %>%
  mutate(
    b150b = b200 + b_200
  ) %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b150b) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b150b,
      )
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5,
      color = "tan"
      )+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm,
      color = "black"
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      title = "Oxygen Boundary vs Proportion of Time, Below 150 m",
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen Boundary (m)",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
ggsave("../output_files/b_50plot.png", plot = b_50plot, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
ggsave("../output_files/b50_150plot.png", plot = b50_150plot, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
ggsave("../output_files/b150bplot.png", plot = b150bplot, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

###trends of surface temperature to dive depth

b_50plottemp <- pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b_50) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b_50)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5,
      color = "pink")+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm,
      color = "black"
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      title = "Ocean Surface Temperature  vs Proportion of Time, Above 50 m",
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature (°C)",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
b50_150plottemp <- pacific_tad %>%
  mutate(
    b50_150 = b100 + b150
  ) %>% 
  select(id, sst, b50_150) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b50_150)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5,
      color = "pink")+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm,
      color = "black"
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      title = "Ocean Surface Temperature  vs Proportion of Time, 50 - 150 m",
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature (°C)",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
b150bplottemp <- pacific_tad %>% 
  mutate(
    b150b = b200 + b_200
  ) %>% 
  select(id, sst, b150b) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b150b)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5,
      color = "pink")+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm,
      color = "black"
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      title = "Ocean Surface Temperature  vs Proportion of Time, Below 150 m",
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature (°C)",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
ggsave("../output_files/b_50plottemp.png", plot = b_50plottemp, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
ggsave("../output_files/b50_150plottemp.png", plot = b50_150plottemp, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
ggsave("../output_files/b150bplottemp.png", plot = b150bplottemp, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

###graphs displaying niche of sharks

dengraph <- ggplot(pacific_tad, aes(x = sst, y = do_depth)) +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
    geom = "polygon",
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Use Density",
                      option = "cividis") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "Temperature–Oxygen Habitat Envelope",
    x = "Temperature (°C)",
    y = "Dissolved Oxygen"
  )

ggsave("../output_files/dengraph.png", plot = dengraph, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
depth_long <- pacific_tad %>% 
  mutate(
      depth_zone = case_when(
        do_depth < 100 ~ "Above 100 m",
        do_depth >= 100 & do_depth <= 200 ~ "100-200 m",
        do_depth > 200 ~ "Below 200 m"
      )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(b_50, b100, b150, b200, b_200),
    names_to = "depth_bin",
    values_to = "time_prop"
  )

depth_long$depth_bin <- factor(
  depth_long$depth_bin,
  levels = c("b_50","b100","b150","b200","b_200")
)

depth_long$depth_zone <- factor(
  depth_long$depth_zone,
  levels = c("Above 100 m", "100-200 m", "Below 200 m")
)

disgraph <- ggplot(depth_long, aes(x = depth_bin, y = time_prop)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "tan", alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal()+
  coord_flip()+
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Time at Each Depth by Dissolved Oxygen Boundary Depth",
    x = "Depth Range",
    y = "Proportion of Time"
  )+
  facet_wrap(~depth_zone)+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))+
  theme_classic()

disgraph

ggsave("../output_files/disgraph.png", plot = disgraph, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
relategraph <- pacific_tad %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = sst, y = do_depth)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "#028284") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Sea Surface Temperature (°C)",
    y = "Dissolved Oxygen Depth",
    title = "Relationship Between SST and DO Depth"
  )

relategraph
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

ggsave("../output_files/relategraph.png", plot = relategraph, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 600)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
